title: Update README: strengthen radical simplicity thesis
description: Refine the README to better articulate the radical simplicity thesis. The CLI is the agent interface (no MCP needed). Git history is the archive (no compaction needed). Ensure the comparison with Beads is fair but highlights ball's architectural advantages clearly.

notes.author: mark
notes.text: README: radical simplicity thesis, typed links, stealth mode, task archival docs
